headline: Ecolab Debt Raise And Finance Leadership Shift Shape Investor Outlook
summary: Ecolab, ticker NYSE:ECL, has completed a multi tranche fixed income offering, raising long term capital across several maturities. The company also announced the election of Bryce L. Mewhorter as Senior Vice President and Corporate Controller. These moves affect Ecolab's funding profile and mark a change in leadership within its finance organization. Ecolab enters these changes with its stock at $248.64 and a mixed return profile, including a gain of 53.0% over three years and 22.2% over...

headline: Ecolab’s CEO is betting on an AI payoff
summary: The prospect of giant data centers draining water tables and raising energy rates doesn’t frighten Christophe Beck, the board chairman, president and chief executive officer of Ecolab, a 103-year-old St. Paul company that built its legacy around the many uses of H2O. The water, hygiene and infection prevention company is better known around the world for its hand sanitizers than for its ...
